title: bermudiana bermudiana var. pachyrhiza
intro: Bermudiana bermudiana var. pachyrhiza, also known as Bermuda button, is a plant species within the family Rutaceae, native to Australia and New Caledonia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Bermudiana bermudiana var. pachyrhiza include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in reducing pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Bermudiana bermudiana var. pachyrhiza can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
